chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-846 of 2023 (Abdullah Nangore Vs. SSP Naushahro Feroze & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on MA No. 7102/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on MA No. 7103/2023 (Ex./A). 4. For hearing of main case. 28-11-2023. Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhatti advocate for the applicant. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Granted. 4. The applicant by preferring the instant Crl. Misc. Application has impugned the order dated 23-10-2023 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Kandiaro whereby his application 22 A/B Cr.P.C for issuance of direction against the police to record his FIR, has been dismissed. It appears that there is dispute between the parties over settlement of account. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the incident as alleged by the applicant has taken place and for that his FIR is not being recorded by the police, then he has an alternate remedy to exhaust by filing a direct complaint of such incident before the Court having jurisdiction; such remedy if is exhausted by him besides being alternate would be adequate in the circumstances of the case. Even otherwise no illegality is noticed in impugned order which may justify this Court to make interference with it by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application, it is dismissed in limine. Judge Nasim/P.A 2 3
